# fly_mpg_attachment (Resource)

Attaches a Fly.io Managed Postgres (MPG) cluster to an app. Import using cluster_id/app.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_mpg_attachment" "example" {
  cluster_id    = fly_mpg_cluster.example.id
  app           = fly_app.example.name
  database      = fly_mpg_database.example.name
  variable_name = "DATABASE_URL"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The app to attach. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `cluster_id` (String) The ID of the MPG cluster. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `database` (String) The database to use for the attachment. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `variable_name` (String) The environment variable name for the connection URI. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `connection_uri` (String, Sensitive) The connection URI set on the app.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the attachment.
